bg.tu_varna.sit.oop1.models

Class Program

  • java.lang.Object
    • bg.tu_varna.sit.oop1.models.Program

  • public class Program
extends java.lang.Object
    The Program class represents a program with attribute name. It also has a record of all subjects for a given year of study.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private java.lang.String name 
      private java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.util.Collection<Subject>> subjectsByCourse

      Gets the name of the program.

      Sets the name of the program.

    • Field Detail

      • name

        private java.lang.String name

      • subjectsByCourse

        private java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.util.Collection<Subject>> subjectsByCourse

    • Constructor Detail

      • Program

        public Program(java.lang.String name)
        throws ProgramException
        Constructs a new Program with the specified name.
        Parameters:
        name - The name of the program.
        Throws:
        ProgramException - if any parameter validation fails.

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Gets the name of the program.
        Returns:
        The name of the program.

      • setName

        public void setName(java.lang.String name)
             throws ProgramException
        Sets the name of the program.
        Parameters:
        name - The name to set.
        Throws:
        ProgramException - if the name is null or empty.

      • getSubjectsByCourse

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.util.Collection<Subject>> getSubjectsByCourse()
        Gets the map of the subjects by year of study for the program.
        Returns:
        Map containing a collection of subjects for each year of study.

      • setSubjectsByCourse

        public void setSubjectsByCourse(java.lang.Integer course,
                                java.util.Collection<Subject> courseSubjects)
                         throws ProgramException
        Sets the subjects for a specific year of study of a program.
        Parameters:
        course - The course number for which the subjects are to be set.
        courseSubjects - The collection of subjects to be associated with the specified year of study.
        Throws:
        ProgramException - If the course number is not in the valid range (1-4) or if the collection of course subjects is null or empty.
